list.name: Ifa
list.desc: Tlalocan Vet

list.name: Escoffier
list.desc: Lead Goose of Precision Gastronomy

list.name: Iansan
list.desc: Head coach of the fitness club at the Collective of Plenty, and a renowned Natlanese nutritionist.

list.name: Varesa
list.desc: A laid-back orchard manager and warrior of the Collective of Plenty. An aspiring hero who hungers for justice... and lots and lots of food!

list.name: Yumemizuki Mizuki
list.desc: A shareholder of Aisa Bathhouse, a baku, and a clinical psychologist. Dedicated to the dispersal of nightmares, and to bringing people peace of mind.

list.name: Traveler (Pyro)
list.desc: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

list.name: Lan Yan
list.desc: A rattan weaver from Chenyu Vale. Clear-minded and well-tempered, she is as lively as a mountain spring.

list.name: Citlali
list.desc: The great shaman from the Masters of the Night-Wind, the universally-revered Granny Itztli.

list.name: Mavuika
list.desc: The leader of Natlan who inherited the Ancient Name of "Kiongozi." She made a vow to illuminate the future of the nation of war with the Sacred Flame.

list.name: Chasca
list.desc: The Peacemaker of the Tlalocan, the ender of all disputes.

list.name: Ororon
list.desc: A young man from the Masters of the Night-Wind who instead lives in the wild alongside all manner of life.

list.name: Xilonen
list.desc: A Name Engraver of the Nanatzcayan, she is especially skilled at finding a good balance between the heavy responsibilities of her job and living well.

list.name: Mualani
list.desc: A well-known guide in Natlan who owns a watersports shop, and expert in all forms of wave-chasing.

list.name: Kachina
list.desc: A young warrior of the Nanatzcayan, given the Ancient Name of "Uthabiti." Kind-hearted and insatiably persistent, she grows stronger and more capable with each setback she faces.

list.name: Kinich
list.desc: A Huitztlan Saurian Hunter skilled at counting costs.

list.name: Emilie
list.desc: A Fontainian perfumer, one who bottles secrets.

list.name: Sethos
list.desc: The Temple of Silence's heir. Burdened with secrets, he comes from the sands.

list.name: Sigewinne
list.desc: A Melusine and the Fortress of Meropide's head nurse. She cares equally for every convict locked in the undersea prison.

list.name: Clorinde
list.desc: An undefeated Champion Duelist. Sword in hand, she defends justice in the Court of Fontaine.

list.name: Arlecchino
list.desc: "The Knave," Fourth of the Fatui Harbingers. A poised, ruthless diplomat. To the children in the House of the Hearth, she is their feared yet dependable "Father."

list.name: Chiori
list.desc: The owner of Chioriya Boutique. A tailor renowned throughout Fontaine.

list.name: Gaming
list.desc: Guard of the Sword and Strongbox Secure Transport Agency, and the head of the "Mighty Mythical Beasts" Wushou troupe.

list.name: Xianyun
list.desc: One of the Mighty and Illuminated Adepti of Jueyun, known as "Cloud Retainer." Expert in all kinds of mechanical contraptions, her heart now turns towards the affairs of the mortal world, through which she walks under the name "Xianyun."

list.name: Chevreuse
list.desc: The captain of the Special Security and Surveillance Patrol, who wears justice as an ever-present seal upon her heart. Her musket shall only ever point at the guilty.

list.name: Navia
list.desc: The current President of Spina di Rosula, who is lovely, dutiful, and a great boss.

list.name: Charlotte
list.desc: Reporter of The Steambird

list.name: Furina
list.desc: The absolute focus of the stage of judgment, until the final applause sounds.

list.name: Neuvillette
list.desc: The Chief Justice of Fontaine, known as the Iudex, is renowned for his unassailable impartiality.

list.name: Wriothesley
list.desc: Duke of the Fortress of Meropide, Lord Incognito of the murky depths.

list.name: Traveler (Hydro)
list.desc: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

list.name: Freminet
list.desc: A reserved young man who is well-versed in diving. Beneath his distant, icy demeanor lies a pure heart bereft of all flaws.

list.name: Lyney
list.desc: A famed Fontainian magician who possesses great stage presence as well as gift of the gab. Audiences are enthralled by his exquisite skills, and they hang on to his every clever word.

list.name: Lynette
list.desc: A magic assistant of few words, her emotions are as inscrutable as any cat's.

list.name: Kirara
list.desc: A courier for Komaniya Express, a delivery company in Inazuma. A nekomata who loves her job and human society.

list.name: Baizhu
list.desc: The owner of Bubu Pharmacy, who is rarely seen without the white snake named Changsheng. His medicinal knowledge is encyclopedic, and his personal intrigues subtle.

list.name: Kaveh
list.desc: A renowned architect from Sumeru who perhaps cares a bit too much about too many things. He is an aesthete troubled by reality.

list.name: Dehya
list.desc: A member of the Eremites, a mercenary organization that roams the sands of Sumeru. Valiant and powerful, she enjoys great fame amongst her fellow Eremites.

list.name: Mika
list.desc: A young knight born to an ordinary family. He serves as a Front-Line Surveyor in his Company. He is a low-key and cautious character.

list.name: Alhaitham
list.desc: The current scribe of the Sumeru Akademiya, a man endowed with extraordinary intelligence and talent. He lives free — free from the searching eyes of ordinary people, anyway.

list.name: Yaoyao
list.desc: Streetward Rambler's youngest disciple. A gentle and caring "little adult."

list.name: Wanderer
list.desc: A wayfaring figure whose identity is a mystery. He dresses like a mountain ascetic, but he certainly does not act the part.

list.name: Faruzan
list.desc: A researcher from "one hundred years ago." She enjoys self-identifying as everyone's senior, and has significant knowledge of ancient scripts and machines of all kinds.

list.name: Layla
list.desc: A Rtawahist student who specializes in Theoretical Astrology. Heavily prone to somnambulism and locked in a grinding war with sleep deprivation, the problem of restful slumber is a most troubling one to her.

list.name: Nahida
list.desc: A caged bird secluded within the confines of the Sanctuary of Surasthana who can only see the world in her dreams.

list.name: Candace
list.desc: A descendant of King Deshret with an amber left eye. The defender of Aaru Village.

list.name: Cyno
list.desc: The General Mahamatra in charge of supervising the researchers of the Akademiya. It is said that when he gets down to work, the General Mahamatra is even more efficient than the "Great Vayuvyastra" made by the Kshahrewar.

list.name: Nilou
list.desc: The star of the Zubayr Theater. She is full of warmth and innocence, and her dances are lively and elegant.

list.name: Traveler (Dendro)
list.desc: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

list.name: Dori
list.desc: An elusive merchant who has a fondness for glittering Mora.

list.name: Collei
list.desc: A trainee ranger active in Avidya Forest. Behind her enthusiastic words and actions hides a slightly introverted personality.

list.name: Tighnari
list.desc: A young researcher well-versed in botany who currently serves as a Forest Watcher in Avidya Forest. He is a straight shooter with a warm heart - and a dab hand at guiding even the dullest of pupils.

list.name: Shikanoin Heizou
list.desc: A young prodigy detective from the Tenryou Commission. His senses are sharp and his thoughts are clear.

list.name: Kuki Shinobu
list.desc: The capable and reliable deputy leader of the "Arataki Gang." Please note: capable and reliable are not appellations for the "Arataki Gang," but for their deputy leader in specific.

list.name: Yelan
list.desc: A mysterious person who claims to work for the Ministry of Civil Affairs, but is a "non-entity" on the Ministry of Civil Affairs' list.

list.name: Xiao
list.desc: A yaksha adeptus who defends Liyue. Also heralded as the "Conqueror of Demons" and "Vigilant Yaksha."

list.name: Xiangling
list.desc: A renowned chef from Liyue. She's extremely passionate about cooking and excels at making her signature hot and spicy dishes.

list.name: Raiden Shogun
list.desc: Her Excellency, the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, who promised the people of Inazuma an unchanging Eternity.

list.name: Razor
list.desc: A boy who lives among the wolves in Wolvendom of Mondstadt, away from human civilization. As agile as lightning.

list.name: Albedo
list.desc: A genius known as the Kreideprinz, he is the Chief Alchemist and Captain of the Investigation Team of the Knights of Favonius.

list.name: Zhongli
list.desc: A mysterious expert contracted by the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. Extremely knowledgeable in all things.

list.name: Chongyun
list.desc: A young exorcist from a family of exorcists. He does everything he can to suppress his abundance of yang energy.

list.name: Diona
list.desc: A young lady who has inherited trace amounts of non-human blood. She is the incredibly popular bartender of the Cat's Tail tavern.

list.name: Diluc
list.desc: The tycoon of a winery empire in Mondstadt, unmatched in every possible way.

list.name: Tartaglia
list.desc: No. 11 of The Harbingers, also known as "Childe." His name is highly feared on the battlefield.

list.name: Xinyan
list.desc: Liyue's sole rock 'n' roll musician. She rebels against ossified prejudices using her music and passionate singing.

list.name: Noelle
list.desc: A maid who faithfully serves the Knights of Favonius. She dreams of joining their ranks someday.

list.name: Xingqiu
list.desc: A young man carrying a longsword who is frequently seen at book booths. He has a chivalrous heart and yearns for justice and fairness for all.

list.name: Fischl
list.desc: A mysterious girl who calls herself "Prinzessin der Verurteilung" and travels with a night raven named Oz.

list.name: Mona
list.desc: A mysterious young astrologer who proclaims herself to be "Astrologist Mona Megistus," and who possesses abilities to match the title. Erudite, but prideful.

list.name: Arataki Itto
list.desc: The first and greatest head of the Arataki Gang, famed throughout Inazuma City's Hanamizaka... Wait, what? You've never heard of them? Are you trying to be funny here?

list.name: Barbara
list.desc: Every citizen of Mondstadt adores Barbara. She learned the word "idol" from a magazine.

list.name: Hu Tao
list.desc: The 77th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. She took over the business at a rather young age.

list.name: Rosaria
list.desc: A sister of the church, though you wouldn't know it if it weren't for her attire. Known for her sharp, cold words and manner, she often works alone.

list.name: Kamisato Ayaka
list.desc: Daughter of the Yashiro Commission's Kamisato Clan. Dignified and elegant, as well as wise and strong.

list.name: Kamisato Ayato
list.desc: The young but highly accomplished head of the Yashiro Commission's Kamisato Clan. Cultured and polite, he is a man of many ways and means.

list.name: Sucrose
list.desc: An alchemist filled with curiosity about all things. She researches bio-alchemy.

list.name: Shenhe
list.desc: An adepti disciple with a most unusual air about her. Having spent much time cultivating in isolation in Liyue's mountains, she has become every bit as cool and distant as the adepti themselves.

list.name: Ganyu
list.desc: The secretary at Yuehai Pavilion. The blood of the qilin, an illuminated beast, flows within her veins.

list.name: Jean
list.desc: The righteous and rigorous Dandelion Knight, and Acting Grand Master of Mondstadt's Knights of Favonius.

list.name: Bennett
list.desc: A good-natured adventurer from Mondstadt who's unfortunately extremely unlucky.

list.name: Sangonomiya Kokomi
list.desc: The Divine Priestess of Watatsumi Island. All of the island's affairs are at this young lady's fingertips.

list.name: Yanfei
list.desc: A well-known legal adviser active in Liyue Harbor. A brilliant young lady in whose veins runs the blood of an illuminated beast.

list.name: Venti
list.desc: One of the many bards of Mondstadt, who freely wanders the city's streets and alleys.

list.name: Kaedehara Kazuha
list.desc: A wandering samurai from Inazuma who is currently with Liyue's Crux Fleet. A gentle and carefree soul whose heart hides a great many burdens from the past.

list.name: Sayu
list.desc: A pint-sized ninja attached to the Shuumatsuban, who always seems sleep-deprived.

list.name: Traveler
list.desc: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

list.name: Traveler (Anemo)
list.desc: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

list.name: Traveler (Electro)
list.desc: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

list.name: Traveler (Geo)
list.desc: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven.

list.name: Thoma
list.desc: The Kamisato Clan's housekeeper. A well-known "fixer" in Inazuma.

list.name: Yoimiya
list.desc: Owner of Naganohara Fireworks. Known as "Queen of the Summer Festival," she excels in her craft of creating fireworks that symbolize people's hopes and dreams.

list.name: Amber
list.desc: Always energetic and full of life, Amber's the best — albeit only — Outrider of the Knights of Favonius.

list.name: Aloy
list.desc: Formerly an outcast, now a hunter of unparalleled skill. Ready to do the right thing at any time.

list.name: Klee
list.desc: An explosives expert and a regular at the Knights of Favonius's confinement room. Also known as Fleeing Sunlight.

list.name: Beidou
list.desc: Captain of her crew, The Crux. She's quite an unbound and forthright woman.

list.name: Keqing
list.desc: The Yuheng of the Liyue Qixing. Keqing has much to say about Rex Lapis's unilateral approach to policymaking in Liyue — but in truth, gods admire skeptics such as her quite a lot.

list.name: Kaeya
list.desc: An accomplished swordsman and a strategic thinker in the Knights of Favonius, rumored to hail from beyond Mondstadt.

list.name: Ningguang
list.desc: The Tianquan of the Liyue Qixing. Her wealth is unsurpassed in all of Teyvat.

list.name: Yae Miko
list.desc: Lady Guuji of the Grand Narukami Shrine. Also serves as the editor-in-chief of Yae Publishing House. Unimaginable intelligence and cunning are hidden under her beautiful appearance.

list.name: Eula
list.desc: The Spindrift Knight, a scion of the old aristocracy, and the Captain of the Knights of Favonius Reconnaissance Company. The reason for which a descendant of the ancient nobles might join the Knights remains a great mystery in Mondstadt to this very day.

list.name: Gorou
list.desc: The great general of Watatsumi Island's forces. He is deeply trusted by his subordinates.

list.name: Yun Jin
list.desc: A renowned Liyue opera singer who is skilled in both playwriting and singing. Her style is one-of-a-kind, exquisite and delicate, much like the person herself.

list.name: Kujou Sara
list.desc: A general of the Tenryou Commission. Bold, decisive, and skilled in battle.

list.name: Lisa
list.desc: The languid but knowledgeable Librarian of the Knights of Favonius, deemed by Sumeru Akademiya to be their most distinguished graduate in the past two centuries.

list.name: Qiqi
list.desc: An apprentice and herb gatherer at Bubu Pharmacy. An undead with a bone-white complexion, she seldom has much in the way of words or emotion.
